title: Captains, Mates, and Pilots of Water Vessels
description: Command or supervise operations of ships and water vessels, such as tugboats and ferryboats. Required to hold license issued by U.S. Coast Guard.

tasks.text: Direct courses and speeds of ships, based on specialized knowledge of local winds, weather, water depths, tides, currents, and hazards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prevent ships under navigational control from engaging in unsafe operations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Serve as a vessel's docking master upon arrival at a port or at a berth.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Consult maps, charts, weather reports, or navigation equipment to determine and direct ship movements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Steer and operate vessels, using radios, depth finders, radars, lights, buoys, or lighthouses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate ship-to-shore radios to exchange information needed for ship operations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dock or undock vessels, sometimes maneuvering through narrow spaces, such as locks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Stand watches on vessels during specified periods while vessels are under way.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect vessels to ensure efficient and safe operation of vessels and equipment and conformance to regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Read gauges to verify sufficient levels of hydraulic fluid, air pressure, or oxygen.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Report to appropriate authorities any violations of federal or state pilotage laws.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide assistance in maritime rescue operations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Signal passing vessels, using whistles, flashing lights, flags, or radios.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure depths of water, using depth-measuring equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Signal crew members or deckhands to rig tow lines, open or close gates or ramps, or pull guard chains across entries.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain boats or equipment on board, such as engines, winches, navigational systems, fire extinguishers, or life preservers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain records of daily activities, personnel reports, ship positions and movements, ports of call, weather and sea conditions, pollution control efforts, or cargo or passenger status.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Advise ships' masters on harbor rules and customs procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Observe loading or unloading of cargo or equipment to ensure that handling and storage are performed according to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Calculate sightings of land, using electronic sounding devices and following contour lines on charts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Learn to operate new technology systems and procedures through instruction, simulators, or models.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct or coordinate crew members or workers performing activities such as loading or unloading cargo, steering vessels, operating engines, or operating, maintaining, or repairing ship equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Arrange for ships to be fueled, restocked with supplies, or repaired.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supervise crews in cleaning or maintaining decks, superstructures, or bridges.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Purchase supplies or equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Tow and maneuver barges or signal tugboats to tow barges to destinations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform various marine duties, such as checking for oil spills or other pollutants around ports or harbors or patrolling beaches.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assign watches or living quarters to crew members.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interview and hire crew members.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct safety drills such as man overboard or fire drills.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
